creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 224068
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.26.0

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to v2.26.0.

This release changes the default AlertManager API to v2 and changes promtool to output to stdout by default, in addition to other enhancements and added features.

A full changelog can be found at https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.26.0

Apologies for how long this port update took.

-David
